data.title: 79d7-2028: Task A — Write RED structural tests for scope-drift and intent-conflict synthetic fixtures
data.description:
## Story
79d7-2028 — Validate scope-drift and intent-conflict enhancements end-to-end using synthetic fixtures

## testing_mode
RED

## TDD Test Approach
Create tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh asserting that the 3 fixture directories exist with correct structural properties. Tests fail RED because the fixture directories do not exist yet.

## File to Create
tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh (executable)

## Test Sections (6 required)

1. **test_fixture_a_exists** — assert tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-a/ticket.md and diff.patch exist
2. **test_fixture_a_has_undocumented_return_change** — grep fixture-a/diff.patch for a '+return' or change line AND grep fixture-a/ticket.md confirms the return type/value is NOT mentioned in the ticket text (scope drift scenario)
3. **test_fixture_b_exists** — assert tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-b/ticket.md and callers.txt exist
4. **test_fixture_b_has_three_callers** — assert fixture-b/callers.txt contains at least 3 caller references handling None; grep for 'None' or 'null' occurring 3+ times
5. **test_fixture_c_exists** — assert tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection/fixture-c/ exists with ticket.md, diff.patch, and investigated-files.txt
6. **test_fixture_c_diff_within_investigated_files** — assert all files changed in fixture-c/diff.patch appear in fixture-c/investigated-files.txt (no out-of-scope changes)

## .test-index Entry
tests/fixtures/scope-drift-detection: tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh [test_fixture_dirs_exist]

Note: Fuzzy match fails for this source path — .test-index entry is required for test gate coverage.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 6 test sections
  Verify: grep -c 'test_fixture_a_exists\|test_fixture_a_has_undocumented\|test_fixture_b_exists\|test_fixture_b_has_three\|test_fixture_c_exists\|test_fixture_c_diff_within' tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Running tests produces failures (RED — fixture dirs do not exist yet)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added with RED marker
  Verify: grep 'scope-drift-detection.*test-e2e-synthetic-fixtures.sh.*\[test_fixture_dirs_exist\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
